languages.text: [Выхватить оружие] "Это было ошибкой. Я прекращу его страдания".
[Draw your weapon] "This was a mistake. I shall end his suffering."
languages.original_text: [Выхватить оружие] "Это было ошибкой. Я прекращу его страдания".

traits.locale_text: [Draw your weapon] "This was a mistake. I shall end his suffering."
[Draw your weapon] "This was a mistake. I shall end his suffering."
[Draw your weapon] "This was a mistake. I shall end his suffering."

languages.text: [Sacar tu arma] «Esto ha sido un error. Acabaré con su sufrimiento».
languages.original_text: [Draw your weapon] "This was a mistake. I shall end his suffering."

traits.locale_text: [Sacar tu arma] «Esto ha sido un error. Acabaré con su sufrimiento».

languages.text: 【拔出武器】“这从一开始就是个错误。我来结束他的痛苦。”
languages.original_text: [Draw your weapon] "This was a mistake. I shall end his suffering."

traits.locale_text: 【拔出武器】“这从一开始就是个错误。我来结束他的痛苦。”

languages.text: [Dégainer votre arme] « C'était une erreur. Je vais abréger ses souffrances. »
languages.original_text: [Draw your weapon] "This was a mistake. I shall end his suffering."

traits.locale_text: [Dégainer votre arme] « C'était une erreur. Je vais abréger ses souffrances. »

languages.text: [Silahını çek] "Bu bir hataydı. Acısına son vereceğim."
languages.original_text: [Draw your weapon] "This was a mistake. I shall end his suffering."

traits.locale_text: [Silahını çek] "Bu bir hataydı. Acısına son vereceğim."

languages.text: [Deine Waffe ziehen] "Das war ein Fehler. Ich werde sein Leid beenden."
languages.original_text: [Draw your weapon] "This was a mistake. I shall end his suffering."

traits.locale_text: [Deine Waffe ziehen] "Das war ein Fehler. Ich werde sein Leid beenden."

languages.text: ［武器を抜く］「これは間違いだった。彼の苦しみを終わらせる」
languages.original_text: [Draw your weapon] "This was a mistake. I shall end his suffering."

traits.locale_text: ［武器を抜く］「これは間違いだった。彼の苦しみを終わらせる」
